source: National Family Health Survey (NFHS-5), 2019-21, India Report
publisher: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) & MoHFW
extractedFrom: Table 4.2 Fertility by background characteristics (TFR for the 3 years preceding the survey), p.124
note: Total fertility rate by background characteristic, NFHS-5 (2019-21). National TFR was 2.0. These cuts are NOT in the NFHS-6 factsheets, so the latest available year for the wealth/education/religion breakdown is NFHS-5. Replacement level is about 2.1.
